evidence_required.item: README.md has been inspected before any rewrite.
Repository manifests and CI workflows have been inspected for setup, test and validation commands.
RECENT_LEARNINGS.md has been read and updated when documentation behaviour changes.
Any unknown deployment, ownership or release detail is recorded as a gap rather than invented.

scoring.criterion: Documentation accurately explains repository purpose, setup and validation commands.
Documentation reflects observed files, scripts and workflows rather than invented implementation details.
Documentation supports maintainers and reviewers with clear ownership, risks and release notes.
Documentation changes preserve existing correct context and record remaining gaps.

blocking_failures.failure: README is rewritten without inspecting package scripts or workflow files.
Deployment, ownership or release claims are invented.
Existing accurate repository context is removed.
Validation commands are omitted from the documentation update.
